name: Heislyc Loh
description: Pioneer ecosystem builder who founded StartupMamak, one of Malaysia's longest running tech startup communities. Actively advises early-stage founders and curates casual Mamak meetups.

name: Mohd Rahimi
description: Core champion of JomWeb, a massive community of Malay-language web developers. Organizes educational initiatives, workshops, and helps self-taught developers find jobs.

name: Keith Rozario
description: Leading cybersecurity community advocate who created rawSEC, Malaysia's top information security community. Writes technical articles and coordinates local CTF competitions.

name: Siti Hafizah
description: Championing diversity in tech. She drives initiatives, panels, and mentorship cohorts to elevate Malaysian female software engineers and tech startup leaders.

name: Tan Ji Sheng
description: A seasoned mobile developer and tech community organizer leading Google Developer Group KL. Curates large tech conferences like DevFest and regular local dev meetups.

name: Lau Cher Han
role: Chief Data Scientist & AI Community Leader
description: A prominent educator and speaker driving data science and AI community initiatives in Malaysia, organizing free workshops, and mentoring aspiring data specialists.

name: Bobby Ong
description: Malaysian entrepreneur and tech builder. Beyond building CoinGecko into a global crypto powerhouse, he actively supports local Web3 developers and tech startup builders.
